info.title: LaRevela-API
info.description: Public REST API powering LaRevela. Use the interactive docs to explore authentication, registration, and item endpoints.

schema.title: Response Analytics Overview Analytics Overview Get

get.summary: Paginated revealed identities for a website
List active sessions for the signed-in user

post.summary: Revoke a specific session for the signed-in user

get.summary: Fetch entries from a lookup collection

parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Records to skip before returning results

parameters.description: Records to skip before returning results

delete.summary: Remove a member from the account

schema.description: Number of websites to skip before listing
schema.title: Offset

parameters.description: Number of websites to skip before listing

get.summary: Get latest Klaviyo sync job status for a website and sync type (internal)

schema.title: Response Get Latest Klaviyo Sync Status Api V1 Websites  Website Id  Sync Status  Sync Type  Get

put.description:
Upsert per-website vendor secrets and refresh origin cache.

This is used for integrations like Klaviyo, Shopify, etc., where
the secrets are scoped to a specific website rather than global
LaRevela credentials.

schema.title: Response Update Website Vendor Config Api V1 Websites  Website Id  Vendor Config Put

get.description:
Return all vendor configs for a website.

This allows the UI or services to read back the per-website vendor
secrets that were previously stored via the PUT endpoint.

schema.title: Response Get Website Vendor Config Api V1 Websites  Website Id  Vendor Config Get

line2.title: Line2
line2.description: Suite, floor, or unit (omit if not applicable).

state.title: State
state.description: State or province code (US two-letter ISO when applicable).

legal_name.title: Legal Name
legal_name.description: Legal business name used for billing documents.

business_info.title: Business Info
business_info.description: Optional free-form business summary that appears in internal tools.

address.description: Optional structured address for the primary headquarters.

tax_id.title: Tax Id
tax_id.description: Federal EIN or equivalent business tax identifier.

vat_number.title: Vat Number
vat_number.description: VAT registration number for international billing.

tax_exempt.title: Tax Exempt
tax_exempt.description: Mark true when the business has verified tax exempt status.

tax_exempt_note.title: Tax Exempt Note
tax_exempt_note.description: Internal note stored alongside tax exemption approvals.

primary_email.title: Primary Email
primary_email.description: Primary billing inbox that receives invoices and payment notices.

name.title: Name
name.description: Full name of the person responsible for billing.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: Optional direct line for urgent billing follow-ups.

cc_emails.title: Cc Emails
cc_emails.description: Additional recipients (up to 5) that should be copied on billing emails.

name.title: Name
name.description: Contact name displayed on invoices and billing emails.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: Optional phone number for urgent communication.

cc_emails.title: Cc Emails
cc_emails.description: Array of additional emails to CC on billing notices.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the person submitting the contact form

message.title: Message
message.example: I'd like to learn more about LaRevela's analytics capabilities.

id.title: Id
id.description: Identifier for the stored contact message

verification_token.title: Verification Token
verification_token.description: Verification token returned from the email verification step.

full_name.title: Full Name
full_name.description: Account owner's full name (used to pre-fill profile details).

monthly_visitors.title: Monthly Visitors
monthly_visitors.description: Typical monthly website visitors or traffic band

contact_number.title: Contact Number
contact_number.description: Best phone number for the requester

business_description.title: Business Description
business_description.example: We operate a multi-brand online retail marketplace focused on sustainable products.

id.title: Id
id.description: Identifier for the stored demo request

verification_token.title: Verification Token
verification_token.description: Verification token returned after email confirmation.

password.title: Password
password.description: Strong password for the owner account.

accept_terms.title: Accept Terms
accept_terms.description: Must be true to acknowledge Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address associated with the account.

remember_me.title: Remember Me
remember_me.description: Set true to issue a long-lived refresh token.

device_label.title: Device Label
device_label.description: Optional device nickname displayed in session management (e.g., 'MacBook Pro').

plan_id.title: Plan Id
plan_id.description: Active billing plan identifier for the user's account, when available.

payment_intent_id.title: Payment Intent Id
payment_intent_id.description: Billing provider payment intent to confirm (e.g., Stripe PI).

set_as_default.title: Set As Default
set_as_default.description: Flag the payment method as default immediately after attaching it.

set_as_default.title: Set As Default
set_as_default.description: Provide true to designate this method as default, false to remove default flag.

billing_details.title: Billing Details
billing_details.description: Optional key/value metadata passed to the billing provider (e.g., name or email).

price.title: Price
price.description: Recurring price in minor units (e.g., cents).

trial_days.title: Trial Days
trial_days.description: Length of free trial in days (null when not available).

reset_token.title: Reset Token
reset_token.description: Reset token supplied via the password reset email.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address associated with the password reset.

new_password.title: New Password
new_password.description: New password that meets complexity requirements.

draft_id.title: Draft Id
draft_id.description: Draft identifier returned when the registration draft was created.

company_name.title: Company Name
company_name.description: Legal or operating name that will appear on invoices and dashboards.

company_website.title: Company Website
company_website.description: Primary website or storefront domain for the company.

verification_token.title: Verification Token
verification_token.description: Optional verification token to guard against stale drafts.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address for the prospective account owner.

plan.title: Plan
plan.description: Plan code from GET /api/v1/billing/plans (for example, Starter or Growth tiers).

payment_method_id.title: Payment Method Id
payment_method_id.description: Customer payment method identifier returned by Stripe or the billing provider.

start_immediately.title: Start Immediately
start_immediately.description: Start the subscription immediately; if false, schedule for the next billing anchor.

cancel_at_period_end.title: Cancel At Period End
cancel_at_period_end.description: If true, allow the subscription to finish the current period before cancelling.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Optional cancellation reason for internal analytics.

plan_id.title: Plan Id
plan_id.description: New plan identifier to switch to.

prorate.title: Prorate
prorate.description: If true, calculate immediate proration charges or credits when switching plans.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address to invite to the organisation.

message.title: Message
message.description: Optional personal message included in the invitation email.
message.example: Welcome aboard! Here's access to the dashboard.

require_2fa.title: Require 2Fa
require_2fa.description: Force the invited user to enable 2FA on first login.

require_2fa.title: Require 2Fa
require_2fa.description: When true, all users must enrol in time-based one-time passwords.

sso_only.title: Sso Only
sso_only.description: Restrict sign-in to SSO providers and disable password login.

first_name.title: First Name
first_name.description: Given name used in greetings and notifications.

last_name.title: Last Name
last_name.description: Family name shown in account directories.

job_title.title: Job Title
job_title.description: Role or title displayed to teammates.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: Optional phone number for billing or alerts.

department.title: Department
department.description: Team or department association used in reports.

photo.title: Photo
photo.description: Hosted image URL for the user's avatar.

secondary_email.title: Secondary Email
secondary_email.description: Optional backup email for critical notifications.

VendorSecret.title: VendorSecret
VendorSecret.description:
Generic vendor secret payload for a website.

The shape is intentionally flexible so we can support many vendors
(klaviyo, shopify, mailchimp, meta, google_ads, etc.).

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address that received the verification code.

verification_id.title: Verification Id
verification_id.description: Verification request identifier returned from step 1.

verification_code.title: Verification Code
verification_code.description: Six digit verification code delivered via email.

account_id.title: Account Id
account_id.description: Account identifier that will own the website.

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: Fully-qualified domain name for the storefront.

acknowledged_at.title: Acknowledged At
acknowledged_at.description: Timestamp when privacy terms were acknowledged.

acknowledged_by.title: Acknowledged By
acknowledged_by.description: Identifier of the team member confirming the privacy policy.

display_name.title: Display Name
display_name.description: Friendly name shown in dashboards (kept separate from domain).

vendors.title: Vendors
vendors.description: Mapping of vendor_code to vendor configuration payload.

WebsiteVendorConfigUpdate.title: WebsiteVendorConfigUpdate
WebsiteVendorConfigUpdate.description:
Request body for updating website-specific vendor configs.

Each key is a vendor_code (e.g. 'klaviyo', 'shopify', 'mailchimp').

triggered_by.title: Triggered By
triggered_by.description: Actor that initiated verification (for example 'system' or 'user').
